mainEntity.name: Difference between temporary and permanent disability in Millcreek UT work accidents?
mainEntity.text: Difference between temporary and permanent disability in Millcreek UT work accidents?

acceptedAnswer.text: Temporary disability pays while healing 66 2/3% wages up to state max. Permanent for lasting impairment rated by doctor.[6]

suggestedAnswer.text: Millcreek on-the-job accidents qualify for TTD until maximum medical improvement then PTD if impairment 0-100% scheduled body parts. Payments vary by injury type; disputes over ratings common—appeal with vocational expert. Permanent benefits lifelong for severe cases.[6]

name: Temporary vs Permanent Disability Millcreek Work Injuries
description: Temporary disability pays while healing 66 2/3% wages up to state max. Permanent for lasting impairment rated by doctor.[6]
